old.comments: Very Nice Psychological Series I Ever Watched.And The Ending Is Fabulous. It Touched My Heart
old.synopsis:
A story about a man employed in a psychiatric ward and a woman, with an antisocial personality disorder, who is a popular writer of children's books.

Moon Kang-Tae (Kim Soo-Hyun) works in the psychiatric ward. His job is to write down the patients' conditions and to deal with unexpected situations, like if patients fight or they run away. He only earns about 1.8 million won (~$1,600 USD) a month. The woman (Seo Yea-Ji) is a popular writer of children's literature, but she is extremely selfish, arrogant and rude.

otherNames: มารร้ายคู่หมายรัก
old.comments: Nice Drama. Only Sad Part Is The Series Has Only 13 Episodes And Plots Move Even Faster. Nice Story and Screenplay. If The Series Longer It Would Have Been Great.
old.synopsis:
When a smart, handsome, and foul-mouthed doctor ‘Paniti,’ or Dr. Pup, met a hot, sexy superstar 'Kluay' they agree they are not each other's types. They hated each other at first sight, but when they have to live together, something strange happens; it looks like Dr. Pup is falling in love with Kluay. To save face from what he said before, that she is not his type, he is trying to act

like he doesn't like her, but can he?

What will the ending of this two be, haters or lovers?

Edit Translation

English

Русский

magyar / magyar nyelv

dansk

otherNames: ลูกแก้วคืนวิญญาณ
old.synopsis:
Ko Se-Yeon (Kim Sa-Rang) is a beautiful prosecutor and she is good at her job. She gets into an accident and dies. Due to mysterious bead Abyss, Ko Se-Yeon is revived, but she now has a different appearance. Ko Se-Yeon (Park Bo-Young) now possesses a common appearance. The mysterious bead Abyss revives dead persons,  but they gain a different appearance. Their appearance depends on how good their spirit was.

Meanwhile, Cha Min (An Se-Ha) is the successor of a cosmetics company. He is smart, humble and has a good heart. He is also unattractive. Cha Min gets into an accident and dies. Due to the mysterious bead Abyss, he comes back to life with a different appearance. Cha Min (Ahn Hyo-Seop) now has a handsome appearance.

Ko Se-Yeon begins to work as an attorney at a law firm. Cha Min begins to work for Ko Se-Yeon at the law firm.

otherNames: ลูกแก้วคืนวิญญาณ

old.comments: When I First Watched Drama, I Didn't Know It Was A Remake Instead The Korean Story. So, I Gave 10 Ratings. Later I Learned That It Was A Remake Again I Watched. This Time It Got Bored. I Don't Know Why I Gave Full Ratings.
old.synopsis: Oh Woo-Ri (Lim Soo-Hyang) works as an assistant writer on a popular drama series. Even though she is dating Detective Lee Gang-Jae (Shin Dong-Wook), she wants to keep her virginity until she marries. Her boyfriend accepts her wish. One day, Oh Woo-Ri goes to an OB-GYN for a regular checkup. Due to her doctor's mistake, Oh Woo-Ri gets pregnant through artificial insemination. The biological father of Oh Woo-Ri’s baby is Raphael (Sung Hoon). He is the CEO of a cosmetics company. He gives off the impression that he is cold, but, in his mind, he is a romanticist and wants to meet a person he loves. His reality is different. He is married to Lee Ma-Ri (Hong Ji-Yoon). She intentionally approached him and married him. Love is nothing in her life.
